Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop

Class SOOPChatBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.SOOPChatBuilder
public class SOOPChatBuilder extends Object
Builder for creating SOOPChat instances.

Accepts a raw streamer ID or supported SOOP URL as input.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SOOPChatBuilder(String streamerId)
    Creates a builder for the target streamer.

  • Constructor Details

    • SOOPChatBuilder

      public SOOPChatBuilder(String streamerId)
      Creates a builder for the target streamer.
      Parameters:
      streamerId - SOOP streamer ID or supported SOOP URL

  • Method Details

    • resolveStreamerId

      public static String resolveStreamerId(String input)
      Resolves a SOOP streamer ID from an ID or SOOP URL.
      Parameters:
      input - raw streamer ID or SOOP URL
      Returns:
      normalized streamer ID, or null if input is null

    • withChatListener

      public SOOPChatBuilder withChatListener(SOOPChatEventListener listener)
      Registers a chat event listener.

      Default is no listener.

      Parameters:
      listener - listener to receive chat events
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withAutoReconnect

      public SOOPChatBuilder withAutoReconnect(boolean autoReconnect)
      Configures automatic reconnection after disconnection.

      Default is true.

      Parameters:
      autoReconnect - whether automatic reconnect is enabled
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withDebugMode

      public SOOPChatBuilder withDebugMode()
      Enables debug logging output.

      Default is disabled.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withMaxReconnectAttempts

      public SOOPChatBuilder withMaxReconnectAttempts(int maxReconnectAttempts)
      Configures the maximum reconnect attempt count.

      Default is 5.

      Parameters:
      maxReconnectAttempts - maximum number of reconnect attempts
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withReconnectDelay

      public SOOPChatBuilder withReconnectDelay(long reconnectDelayMs)
      Configures the base reconnect delay in milliseconds.

      Default is 5000 ms.

      Parameters:
      reconnectDelayMs - reconnect delay in milliseconds
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withCredentials

      public SOOPChatBuilder withCredentials(String soopId, String soopPassword) throws IOException
      Configures SOOP login credentials for authenticated chat access.

      Default is no authentication. Authentication is optional but required for some restricted streams.

      Parameters:
      soopId - SOOP account ID
      soopPassword - SOOP account password
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining
      Throws:
      IOException - if login fails or the login response cannot be parsed

    • build

      public SOOPChat build()
      Builds a SOOPChat instance with current configuration.
      Returns:
      configured SOOP chat client
